title: Russian attacks kill more than 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
summary_full: Kyiv said it would begin a truce on 6 May and then "act symmetrically" after Moscow declared a pause for its Victory Day parade.
summary_public: Kyiv said it would begin a truce on 6 May and then "act symmetrically" after Moscow declared a pause for its Victory Day parade.

RU.evidence: Russian attacks kill more than 20 ahead of rival ceasefires
